ticks.label: Thursday, March 26 · 09:00
ticks.summary: Thursday morning workday begins — characters disperse to their respective workplaces and homes, no significant intersections.

ticks.label: Thursday, March 26 · 13:00
ticks.summary: A water main break on 1st Ave N detours Jolene into Tuck’s Books, where she meets Amber for the first time in an easy ten-minute exchange that stays with her longer than makes sense.

ticks.label: Thursday, March 26 · 17:00
ticks.summary: Evening shift rotation begins — Cassidy opens The Rail, Marcus heads to the refinery — and Eli and Travis cross paths briefly downtown in their first acknowledged encounter.

ticks.label: Thursday, March 26 · 20:00
ticks.summary: The city settles into its Thursday night rhythm — Cassidy works the bar, Marcus is deep in his shift at the refinery, Jolene reads the novel she bought today, Travis ties flies at the kitchen table.

ticks.label: Friday, March 27 · 09:00
ticks.summary: A burst pipe floods Tuck’s Books; Jolene encounters a high school acquaintance at the coffee shop.

ticks.label: Friday, March 27 · 13:00
ticks.summary: Travis helps Amber salvage flood-damaged books; high school basketball team makes state playoffs.

ticks.label: Friday, March 27 · 17:00
ticks.summary: Marcus confronts his supervisor over a buried safety report; late-season snowstorm warning issued.

ticks.label: Friday, March 27 · 20:00
ticks.summary: Storm fills The Rail Bar; Cole comes in from the ranch; Eli befriends a trucker with stories.

ticks.label: Friday, March 27 · 23:00
ticks.summary: Power outage hits The Heights; Nora finishes a grueling double shift; the storm dumps eight inches.

ticks.label: Saturday, March 28 · 09:00
ticks.summary: Post-storm morning: Cole discovers a stray dog at his ranch; I-90 accident detours traffic downtown.

ticks.label: Saturday, March 28 · 13:00
ticks.summary: Jolene and Amber’s second real conversation at the flooded bookstore; Eli learns he’s losing his apartment.

ticks.label: Saturday, March 28 · 17:00
ticks.summary: Basketball playoff game packs MetraPark; Petra learns her architecture project faces surprise client review.

ticks.label: Saturday, March 28 · 20:00
ticks.summary: Eli reads at open mic night and the room responds; Travis has a transcendent evening on the Yellowstone.

ticks.label: Saturday, March 28 · 23:00
ticks.summary: Marcus files the safety report against his supervisor; Cole’s stray dog inches closer to the house.

ticks.label: Sunday, March 29 · 08:00
ticks.summary: Mountain lion spotted near the Rimrocks, trail closed; Amber meets insurance adjuster at the bookstore.

ticks.label: Sunday, March 29 · 12:00
ticks.summary: Downtown development meeting draws a crowd and gets heated; Ryan and his kids explore the Rimrocks overlook.

ticks.label: Sunday, March 29 · 15:00
ticks.summary: Travis offers Eli his spare room; a public proposal at the coffee shop draws cheers and complicated feelings.

ticks.label: Sunday, March 29 · 18:00
ticks.summary: Cole’s stray dog comes inside; Petra and Marcus share an accidental dinner at a new restaurant.

ticks.label: Sunday, March 29 · 20:00
ticks.summary: Jolene texts Amber about the novel; the weekend closes with threads open and a city settling into Sunday night.
